title: ffi: encode_chat_payload serde_json unwrap can crash Dart VM
description: ffi/src/api/client.rs encode_chat_payload (called by client_send_message) uses serde_json::to_vec(&ClearMessage::Chat {...}).unwrap(). A panic in Dart FFI code propagates as an unhandled C abort signal that crashes the Flutter app. Fix: return a null pointer or error code on serialization failure instead of panicking.
